text.zh: 知识蒸馏 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Knowledge Distillation is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: 知识蒸馏训练较小的学生模型去匹配较大教师模型的软化输出。软概率携带类别相似性信息，而硬标签不会显露这些信息。
text.en: Knowledge distillation trains a smaller student model to match the softened outputs of a larger teacher. The soft probabilities carry class-similarity information that hard labels do not expose.
